inputs.shares_source: Mesabi Trust 2026 Form 10-K: 13,120,010 units outstanding at April 21, 2026.

valuation_methodology.decision_rule: Display only values reproduced by valid calculation proofs. Missing reserve, production, royalty-tier, or legal claim evidence remains unpriced.

valuation_change_log.author: valuation-contract-v2 migration
valuation_change_log.reason: Retire unsupported analyst ranges and make calculation lineage authoritative.
changes: Producing royalty stream changed from provisional $30/$35/$42 to unpriced pending a reserve and royalty distribution schedule.
Standalone concentration reserve changed from additive -$5/-$3/-$1 to an embedded risk control so depletion and downtime cannot be counted twice.
Current arbitration changed from $0/$0/$13 to unpriced; the historical award remains context, not a current payoff estimate.
Trust reserve changed from $1/$2/$3 to calculated $18.341533m / 13.12001m units.

legacy_component_valuation_snapshot.rule: Historical comparison only; excluded from Contract v2 production value.

component_valuation.coverage_statement: Every currently identified material ownership claim, liability, and option is valued once. Unknown claims remain an evidence blocker, not an unvalued line item.

valuation.evidence: Proof base 35.0001/unit via owner_cash_or_dividend_discount@1.0; filings MSB/investor-documents/sec-edgar/10-K_20260422_rpt20260131_acc0001104659_26_046864.htm and MSB/investor-documents/sec-edgar/10-Q_20260612_rpt20260430_acc0001104659_26_073470.htm.
valuation.assumption_summary: Present value of after-trust royalty distributions under explicit volume, pellet-price, bonus, and discount-rate cases.
valuation.cross_check: Range must be reconciled to primary filings, normalized economics, and relevant transaction or public-market evidence before IC approval.
valuation.falsifier: Primary evidence or through-cycle results support economics below the low case or reveal an omitted claim.

source.locator: FY2026 declared distributions $16.794 million or $1.28 per unit
Cover page, 13,120,010 units outstanding at April 21, 2026

assumptions.label: Duration-adjusted distribution capitalization multiple
assumptions.rationale: Bear uses trough FY2026 distribution run-rate with finite reserve and Cliffs concentration embedded; base mid-cycle seven-year owner-cash path; bull modest bonus-tier recovery uplift.

components.label: Finite reserve and counterparty concentration reserve

valuation.evidence: Finite claim and Cliffs/Northshore concentration confirmed in 10-K/8-K; no primary recoverable-tonnage or mine-life schedule. Provisional -$5/-$3/-$1 remains evidence-blocked. See evidence_reconciliation_2026-07-15.md.
valuation.assumption_summary: Deduction for depletion, operator concentration, interruption, and terminal-value uncertainty.
valuation.cross_check: Range must be reconciled to primary filings, normalized economics, and relevant transaction or public-market evidence before IC approval.
valuation.falsifier: Primary evidence or through-cycle results support economics below the low case or reveal an omitted claim.

valuation.evidence: Proof base 0.0/unit via risk_adjusted_milestone_value@1.0; filings MSB/investor-documents/sec-edgar/10-K_20260422_rpt20260131_acc0001104659_26_046864.htm and MSB/investor-documents/sec-edgar/10-Q_20260612_rpt20260430_acc0001104659_26_073470.htm.
valuation.assumption_summary: Base assigns no value to the undisclosed arbitration. Only a separately evidenced incremental recovery beyond ordinary royalties may enter the high sensitivity; ordinary base and bonus royalties remain in the producing stream.
valuation.cross_check: Do not promote the high case into base until a primary legal record states a claim, remedy, timing, and collectibility. The 2024 collected award is a closed, non-recurring dispute and is not a comparable current payoff.
valuation.falsifier: Dismissal, an adverse award, a settlement below the separately modeled incremental amount, or a remedy limited to royalties already accrued in the producing stream.

source.locator: Cover page, 13,120,010 units outstanding at April 21, 2026
Cliffs paid $71,185,029 on 2024-10-04; prior dispute closed

assumptions.label: Incremental recovery beyond ordinary royalties
assumptions.rationale: Base assigns no value to the undisclosed September 2025 arbitration. High sensitivity only for separately evidenced incremental recovery; prior collected award is context, not a current payoff.

assumptions.label: Probability of incremental recovery
assumptions.rationale: No primary filing states claim amount, schedule, or collectibility for the current AAA panel; high case is unapproved upside sensitivity only.

components.label: Trust cash and other net claims

valuation.evidence: Proof base 1.398/unit via net_asset_value@1.0; filings MSB/investor-documents/sec-edgar/10-K_20260422_rpt20260131_acc0001104659_26_046864.htm and MSB/investor-documents/sec-edgar/10-Q_20260612_rpt20260430_acc0001104659_26_073470.htm.
valuation.assumption_summary: Source-locked net trust reserve divided by source-locked units; refresh after every filing.
valuation.cross_check: Latest disclosed unallocated reserve divided by disclosed units reproduces the component exactly; no unsupported range is added.

source.locator: Page 12, Comparison of Unallocated Reserve; April 30, 2026 amount $18,341,533
Cover page, units outstanding at April 21, 2026

assumptions.label: Reserve adjustment for contingent legal costs and timing
assumptions.rationale: Low case haircuts reserve for contingent arbitration costs; base uses April 30, 2026 filing mark; high uses January 31, 2026 reserve of $20.403M.

valuation.falsifier: Material contingent legal costs or other senior liabilities consume the unallocated reserve.

economic_claim.description: One diluted share of MSB, including every identified operating claim, asset, liability, and option.
economic_claim.unit_source: Mesabi Trust 2026 Form 10-K: 13,120,010 units outstanding at April 21, 2026.
economic_claim.enterprise_to_equity_reconciliation: Operating and asset claims are valued once; cash, debt, financing, reserves, and other senior claims are included as separate components or within the stated equity basis.

economic_value.accounting_reference: Mesabi Trust 2026 Form 10-K and Annual Report, including the audited unallocated reserve bridge.

component_groups.label: Producing royalty and bonus stream
component_groups.valuation_basis: Present value of after-trust royalty distributions under explicit volume, pellet-price, bonus, and discount-rate cases.
component_groups.adjustments: Low/base/high values incorporate ownership, tax, funding, cycle, and realization adjustments described in the component evidence.
component_groups.overlap_control: Unique overlap key producing_royalty_stream; no other component capitalizes the same claim.

component_groups.label: Finite reserve and counterparty concentration reserve
component_groups.economic_claim: Finite reserve and counterparty concentration reserve
component_groups.valuation_basis: Deduction for depletion, operator concentration, interruption, and terminal-value uncertainty.
component_groups.adjustments: Low/base/high values incorporate ownership, tax, funding, cycle, and realization adjustments described in the component evidence.
component_groups.overlap_control: Unique overlap key depletion_and_concentration_reserve; no other component capitalizes the same claim.

component_groups.label: Arbitration and bonus-payment option
component_groups.valuation_basis: Risked present value of incremental distributions only; ordinary producing royalties remain in the core stream.
component_groups.adjustments: Low/base/high values incorporate ownership, tax, funding, cycle, and realization adjustments described in the component evidence.
component_groups.overlap_control: Unique overlap key arbitration_and_bonus_option; no other component capitalizes the same claim.

risk_and_timing.probability_basis: Starter probability is an explicit analyst judgment pending base-rate and milestone reconciliation.
risk_and_timing.timing_basis: Scenario range includes delay and failure outcomes.
risk_and_timing.remaining_capital_basis: Remaining capital and financing are deducted in the stated option range.

component_groups.label: Trust cash and other net claims
component_groups.economic_claim: Trust cash and other net claims
component_groups.valuation_basis: Net realizable trust assets after administrative costs and non-royalty claims.
component_groups.adjustments: Low/base/high values incorporate ownership, tax, funding, cycle, and realization adjustments described in the component evidence.
component_groups.overlap_control: Unique overlap key trust_cash_and_other_claims; no other component capitalizes the same claim.

wisdom_applied: Horizon Kinetics: treat the royalty as a long-lived economic claim rather than a one-year yield security.
Marathon/Capital Returns: production and reserve response determine duration.
Klarman: legal recovery is separate, probability-weighted optionality.
limitations: Starter ranges are analyst estimates, not committee-approved price targets.
The model remains evidence-blocked until primary-source normalization, comparable selection, and downside cases pass independent review.

component_valuation_results.decision_rule: Use the complete low/base/high component schedule. Embedded components are estimated but not added twice.

component_review_queue.decision_rule: Each assigned rater records accept, challenge, or reject with a proposed range and evidence. The aggregator may not silently average disputed ranges.

items.label: Producing royalty and bonus stream
mandatory_checks: Is the valuation method appropriate for this economic claim?
Is the security's ownership claim and economic-unit denominator reconciled correctly?
Does the evidence support the low/base/high range and its timing?
Are comparable assets truly like-for-like after production, contract, location, capital, ownership, and realization adjustments?
For an option, are success probability, time to realization, and remaining owner-funded capital explicit?
Is the component additive, or already embedded in another component?
What observation would move the base estimate materially?

items.label: Arbitration and bonus-payment option
mandatory_checks: Is the valuation method appropriate for this economic claim?
Is the security's ownership claim and economic-unit denominator reconciled correctly?
Does the evidence support the low/base/high range and its timing?
Are comparable assets truly like-for-like after production, contract, location, capital, ownership, and realization adjustments?
For an option, are success probability, time to realization, and remaining owner-funded capital explicit?
Is the component additive, or already embedded in another component?
What observation would move the base estimate materially?

mandatory_checks: Is the valuation method appropriate for this economic claim?

Is the component additive, or already embedded in another component?
What observation would move the base estimate materially?

Is the component additive, or already embedded in another component?
What observation would move the base estimate materially?

valuation_method_route.label: Scarce assets, royalties, and optionality
failure_modes: gross asset value mistaken for shareholder value
operating cash flow and NAV counted twice
remote options treated as contracted cash
valuation_method_route.decision_rule: Use one primary method and no more than two corroborating methods; irrelevant methods and personas remain silent.

economic_ownership_map.evidence: Finite claim and Cliffs/Northshore concentration confirmed in 10-K/8-K; no primary recoverable-tonnage or mine-life schedule. Provisional -$5/-$3/-$1 remains evidence-blocked. See evidence_reconciliation_2026-07-15.md.
economic_ownership_map.scenario_assumptions: Deduction for depletion, operator concentration, interruption, and terminal-value uncertainty.
economic_ownership_map.tax_and_realization_adjustments: Low/base/high values incorporate ownership, tax, funding, cycle, and realization adjustments described in the component evidence.
economic_ownership_map.falsifier: Primary evidence or through-cycle results support economics below the low case or reveal an omitted claim.

judgments.label: Finite reserve and counterparty concentration reserve
judgments.evidence: Finite claim and Cliffs/Northshore concentration confirmed in 10-K/8-K; no primary recoverable-tonnage or mine-life schedule. Provisional -$5/-$3/-$1 remains evidence-blocked. See evidence_reconciliation_2026-07-15.md.

method_route.label: Scarce assets, royalties, and optionality
failure_modes: gross asset value mistaken for shareholder value
operating cash flow and NAV counted twice
remote options treated as contracted cash
method_route.decision_rule: Use one primary method and no more than two corroborating methods; irrelevant methods and personas remain silent.

valuation.interpretation: value_per_share is withheld while any material additive component is unpriced; priced_components_per_share is not a complete security value.

scenario_contract.rule: Cases must change cited causal operating, capital, probability, timing, or financing drivers—not only a terminal multiple.

top_value_drivers.label: Arbitration and bonus-payment option
top_value_drivers.scenario_assumptions: Base assigns no value to the undisclosed arbitration. Only a separately evidenced incremental recovery beyond ordinary royalties may enter the high sensitivity; ordinary base and bonus royalties remain in the producing stream.

top_value_drivers.label: Producing royalty and bonus stream
top_value_drivers.scenario_assumptions: Present value of after-trust royalty distributions under explicit volume, pellet-price, bonus, and discount-rate cases.

top_value_drivers.label: Trust cash and other net claims
top_value_drivers.scenario_assumptions: Source-locked net trust reserve divided by source-locked units; refresh after every filing.

source_lineage.locator: FY2026 declared distributions $16.794 million or $1.28 per unit

Cover page, 13,120,010 units outstanding at April 21, 2026

Page 12, Comparison of Unallocated Reserve; April 30, 2026 amount $18,341,533

blockers: component groups must cover every additive component exactly once; omitted=[], extra=['depletion_and_concentration_reserve']
validation_errors: component groups must cover every additive component exactly once; omitted=[], extra=['depletion_and_concentration_reserve']

falsifiers: Primary evidence or through-cycle results support economics below the low case or reveal an omitted claim.
Dismissal, an adverse award, a settlement below the separately modeled incremental amount, or a remedy limited to royalties already accrued in the producing stream.
Material contingent legal costs or other senior liabilities consume the unallocated reserve.
Primary evidence or through-cycle results support economics below the low case or reveal an omitted claim.
required_refresh_triggers: new filing or material operating update

change_log.author: valuation-contract-v2 migration
change_log.reason: Retire unsupported analyst ranges and make calculation lineage authoritative.
changes: Producing royalty stream changed from provisional $30/$35/$42 to unpriced pending a reserve and royalty distribution schedule.
Standalone concentration reserve changed from additive -$5/-$3/-$1 to an embedded risk control so depletion and downtime cannot be counted twice.
Current arbitration changed from $0/$0/$13 to unpriced; the historical award remains context, not a current payoff estimate.
Trust reserve changed from $1/$2/$3 to calculated $18.341533m / 13.12001m units.

change_control.rule: A source fact is locked. Every assumption change requires a reason, author, timestamp, and before/after value.

universal_valuation_contract.decision_rule: No security is decision-grade until every material claim is valued exactly once by a valid calculation proof and every material evidence blocker is resolved.

context_overlay.disclaimer: Context only. Tailwinds inform stance and overlay sizing; they do not auto-inflate Lawrence base IRR. Promotion to base case requires [HUMAN REVIEW].
